products.menuLine: Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 · Tennessee · $28 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Journey: Novice · Notes: banana, caramel

guidance.bestFor: Jack Daniel's name ask, Tennessee whiskey curious, classic bar call.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants Kentucky bourbon or Scotch only.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member wants the iconic Jack pour — banana bread sweetness and charcoal-mellowed Tennessee oak.
guidance.memberBlurb: Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 — the black-label Tennessee whiskey America never stopped buying. Banana, caramel, and charcoal mellow beside a Habano.

products.menuLine: Jack Daniel's Single Barrel Select · Tennessee · $55 · 94 proof (47.0% ABV) · Journey: Intermediate · Notes: banana, caramel

guidance.bestFor: Jack Daniel's request, Tennessee whiskey curious, Habano pairing.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants Kentucky bourbon or Scotch only.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member wants Tennessee character — banana bread, caramel, and toasted oak.
guidance.memberBlurb: Jack Daniel's Single Barrel — banana and caramel through charcoal-mellowed Tennessee oak. The Jack pour worth recommending beside a cigar.

products.menuLine: Jefferson's Ocean Aged at Sea · Kentucky · $85 · 90 proof (45.0% ABV) · Journey: Intermediate · Notes: caramel, vanilla

guidance.bestFor: Demo night, gift story, member wants something to discuss.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when a story pour matters — caramel and brine from ocean-aged bourbon beside a cigar.
guidance.memberBlurb: Jefferson's Ocean — bourbon that crossed the sea. Brine and caramel with a story every lounge guest asks about.

products.menuLine: Jim Beam Kentucky Straight Bourbon · Kentucky · $20 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Journey: Novice · Notes: vanilla, caramel

guidance.bestFor: Bourbon beginner, Old Fashioned base, budget Kentucky pour.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants allocated or high-proof only.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend as America's everyday bourbon — vanilla, caramel, and oak without pretense.
guidance.memberBlurb: Jim Beam White Label — the bourbon in every American pantry. Vanilla and caramel Kentucky honesty beside a medium cigar.

products.menuLine: Johnnie Walker Black Label · Scotland · $42 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Notes: honey, smoke

guidance.bestFor: Gift pour, blend curious, won't spend Blue money.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when prestige Scotch is needed at accessible price — honey, smoke, dried fruit.
guidance.memberBlurb: Johnnie Walker Black — honey and gentle smoke in the blend everyone knows. Prestige without the Blue Label receipt.

products.menuLine: Johnnie Walker Blue Label · Scotland · $225 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Notes: honey, dark fruit

guidance.bestFor: Gift pour, status request, member names Blue Label, lounge demo prestige.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants single-malt purist only or budget under $50.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when prestige recognition matters — honeyed blend with smoke and dark fruit, universally known bottle.
guidance.memberBlurb: Johnnie Walker Blue — instant prestige in the glass. Honey, dark fruit, and a whisper of smoke; value debated, recognition undeniable.

products.menuLine: Johnnie Walker Green Label · Scotland · $65 · 86 proof (43.0% ABV) · Notes: smoke, cedar

guidance.bestFor: Malt blend fan, medium-full cigar, discontinued-era prestige still stocked.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member wants vatted malt character — smoke, cedar, and citrus without grain spirit.
guidance.memberBlurb: Johnnie Walker Green — blended malts only, with smoke and cedar. The vatted malt pour for members between Black and Blue.

products.menuLine: Ketel One Vodka · Netherlands · $28 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Notes: clean, citrus peel

guidance.bestFor: Vodka soda, martini base, member wants neutral spirit.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member wants a clean neutral spirit — citrus peel and mineral.
guidance.memberBlurb: Ketel One — crisp Dutch vodka with citrus peel and mineral. Clean enough to let a flavored Connecticut cigar speak.
